headline: Boston Scientific (BSX): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Shareholders of Boston Scientific would probably like to forget the past six months even happened. The stock dropped 52.5% and now trades at $42.79. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Faces WATCHMAN Slowdown But Analysts Still See Upside
summary: With an upside potential of 62.55%, Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is among the 12 Strong Buy Stocks with High Upside According to Analysts. On July 8, Needham analyst Mike Matson lowered the firm’s price target on Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) to $57 from $77 while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. The adjustment followed management commentary […]

headline: Are Boston Scientific’s (BSX) Sterile-Packaging Recalls Reframing the Narrative on Quality and Regulatory Risk?
summary: Boston Scientific recently initiated several voluntary Class II recalls of its CRE and CRE Pro Wireguided endoscopy devices worldwide due to potential sterile breaches in packaging, affecting tens of thousands of units across multiple size ranges. The recalls underscore the operational and regulatory risks inherent in Boston Scientific’s expanding minimally invasive device portfolio, especially as it integrates recent acquisitions and scales global distribution. We’ll now examine how these...
